name: fireside-publish
description: Publish and manage Fireside Strategies deals on the live investor portal by chatting with Claude. Bundles the structured deal-authoring workflow (flagged house defaults, deep multi-source market research with real citations, a headline derived from the actual returns model) and a self-contained Node publishing tool that validates each deal against the real finance engine and commits it to the portal repo (Vercel auto-deploys). The GitHub token lives in the plugin's config.json — set it once and publish straight from chat; no MCP server, no per-session env vars.
